programme.title: Santo Antonio, (1946, Western)
programme.desc: 1877, sudoeste do Texas. Milhares de cabeças de gado eram empurradas para o norte do estado, sem que haja controle algum.

programme.title: Catlow, (1971, Western)
programme.desc: Cowan procura pelo seu amigo de infância Catlow, mas revela-se que Cowan é um oficial de polícia e a relação entre ambos não será nada fácil. Catlow é um ladrão, que junto com seus homens, reuniu gado sem marcar e planeja vendê-lo em Abilene.

programme.title: O Dólar Furado, (1965, Western)
programme.desc: Estados Unidos, segunda metade do século 19. Gary O'Hara é um ex-capitão do Exército dos Estados Confederados.

programme.title: A Marca da Forca, (1968, Western)
programme.desc: Eles o cravaram de balas. Eles o penduraram pelo pescoço. Eles o deixaram para morrer. Mas eles cometeram dois erros fatais: eles tentaram enforcar o homem errado, e não terminaram o trabalho.

programme.title: Por uns Dólares a Mais, (1965, Western)
programme.desc: Monco é um astuto caçador de recompensas, que perambula pelas cidades do velho oeste americano em busca de um novo alvo.

programme.title: O Voo da Águia, (1979, Western)
programme.desc: Pike, Martin Sheen, é um jovem forasteiro da cidade que se vê preso e perdido em meio ao deserto oeste selvagem quando o seu amigo e caçador de peles morre.

programme.title: Renegado impiedoso, (1972, Western)
programme.desc: Pardon Chato é um índio Apache mestiço que vive na linha entre duas culturas, balanceando a sua tribo com o encantamento que tem pelo mundo dos brancos.

programme.title: Quando Explode a Vingança, (1971, Western)
programme.desc: Juan Miranda é um camponês rude com coração de Robin Hood. Sean Mallory é um revolucionário irlandês que é especialista em dinamite e vive agora no México.

programme.title: Se Encontrar Sartana, Reze pela sua Morte, (1968, Western)
programme.desc: O lendário herói Sartana é chamado para investigar uma série de roubos e assassinatos, que levam a consequências surpreendentes.

programme.title: Intermediário.com, (2009, Dramedy)
programme.desc: Baseado em uma história real. O empresário Jack Harris tem uma linda família e uma carreira de sucesso, recuperando empresas problemáticas. Até que ele conhece Wayne Beering e Buck Dolby, uma dupla que atua com pornografia na internet.

programme.title: Acima Da Lei, (2018, Thriller)
programme.desc: Uma mulher pede a seu ex-marido, um advogado renomado, que defenda seu irmão criminoso, acusado de matar um promotor público.

programme.title: Refúgio do Silêncio, (2016, Thriller)
programme.desc: Funcionários de uma empresa vão a um refúgio nas montanhas e descobrem o horror por trás do lugar.

programme.title: Infectados, (2010, Action)
programme.desc: Após perder contato com um grupo de pesquisadores em uma ilha remota, uma corporação militar contrata um grupo de cientistas para descobrir o que deu errado.

programme.title: 4 Cavaleiros do Apocalipse, (2022, Action)
programme.desc: Um time de cientistas precisa correr contra o tempo para impedir uma série de desastres ao redor do planeta, anunciando que o apocalipse está próximo.

programme.title: Original Gangster, (2020, Thriller)
programme.desc: Conheça a diferente vida de Castor: órfão quando criança, forçado a sobreviver no deserto, até crescer e chegar a Londres, onde se tornou um dos principais chefões do submundo do crime.

programme.title: Em rota de colisão, (2020, Action)
programme.desc: Um grupo de terroristas russos sequestra um avião americano e planeja derrubá-lo em uma usina nuclear perto de Washington D.C. Cabe à tripulação e aos passageiros do voo, a missão de impedi-los antes que seja tarde demais.

programme.title: Uma Aventura Selvagem, (2021, Adventure)
programme.desc: Dois irmãos são atacados por animais selvagens enquanto procuram por seu pai desaparecido no meio da floresta amazônica. Mas à medida em que continuam sua aventura, eles começam a perceber que existe algo muito mais sinistro por trás desses ataques.

programme.title: Crimes Obscuros, (2016, Thriller)
programme.desc: O policial Tadek investiga um caso de assassinato não resolvido e encontra semelhanças do crime em um livro do artista polonês Krystov Kozlow. Ele começa a investigar a vida do escritor e da sua namorada, uma mulher misteriosa que trabalha num sex club.

programme.title: Jogo da Sobrevivência, (2014, Thriller)
programme.desc: Baseado em uma história real. Reagan, uma estrela do atletismo, é sequestrada por uma dupla de sociopatas depois que seu carro quebra em uma estrada deserta para a liberdade.

programme.title: O Palhaço, (2019, Creature Features)
programme.desc: Depois de comprar uma boneca, a vida de Lane piora quando amigos próximos e familiares começam a desaparecer.

programme.title: A Invasão Zumbi, (2013, Zombies)
programme.desc: Quando zumbis tomam conta de São Francisco, um grupo desesperado sobrevive trancando-se dentro da prisão de Alcatraz. Quando os mortos-vivos violam a ilha, nossos heróis são forçados a retornar ao continente invadido pelos mortos-vivos.

programme.title: A Ilha dos Tubarões, (2012, Creature Features)
programme.desc: Um grupo de completos estranhos se vê isolado por um louco rico em seu complexo na ilha. Eles são forçados a uma luva horripilante, onde devem sobreviver a uma barragem de espécies cada vez mais mortais de tubarão.

programme.title: V/H/S - Viral, (2012, Zombies)
programme.desc: Em busca da fama na internet, um grupo de adolescentes começa a filmar fenômenos estranhos. Mas eles não sabem que só conseguirão a atenção desejada quando forem protagonistas de acontecimentos sobrenaturais e sangrentos.

programme.title: Dia dos Mortos, (1985, Horror)
programme.desc: Enquanto o mundo é tomado por zumbis, um grupo de cientistas e militares abrigados em um bunker subterrâneo na Flórida devem determinar como devem lidar com a horda de mortos-vivos e com as diferenças entre os sobreviventes.

programme.title: Aranhas!, (2021, Action)
programme.desc: Quando um experimento dá errado em um laboratório no meio do deserto, o local fica infestado de aranhas gigantes e ainda há pessoas presas lá dentro. Um grupo de operações de guerra chega para enfrentar o problema, mas não têm ideia do que enfrentarão ali

programme.title: Ataque do Tubarão Mutante, (2011, Creature Features)
programme.desc: Quando um navio do Semestre no Mar é afundado por um tubarão de duas cabeças, os sobreviventes fogem para um atol deserto. Mas quando começa a inundar, os aliados não estão mais a salvo das mandíbulas duplas do monstro.

programme.title: Necrotério, (2006, Zombies)
programme.desc: Uma brincadeira de estudantes universitários se torna mortal quando descobrem que um diretor de funerária pode ter sido libertado de um manicômio um pouco cedo demais.

programme.title: Mortos Vivos, (2020, Zombies)
programme.desc: Um xerife deve resgatar uma família distante de uma montanha durante a erupção de um vulcão e lutar contra uma horda de zumbis cheios de lava trazidos à vida por uma maldição.

programme.title: Tubarões de Gelo, (2016, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Uma nova raça de tubarões vorazes e agressivos racha o fundo do oceano congelado de uma estação de pesquisa do Ártico, devorando todos os que caem.

programme.title: É o dia do anual Exame de Promoção de Demônio Raposa. Miroku e seus amigos ficam presos nos testes. Shippo tira sarro de Inuyasha e sobe no ranking.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR

programme.title: O ferreiro Toshu forjou uma lâmina de demônio usando uma das escamas de Ryujin, e a Dakki nasceu. Toda vez que Inuyasha tenta atacar, ele é prejudicado pela energia demoníaca.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR
programme.sub-title: A Tessaiga de Escamas de Dragão

programme.title: O Tetsusaiga atingiu o poder das escamas de dragão. A fim de poder usar rapidamente o poder demoníaco, Inuyasha não tem escolha a não ser passar por treinamento.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR

programme.title: Inuyasha e Koga chegam ao local da luta de Moryomaru e Naraku. Mas Moryomaru, que quer seus cacos de Shikon, pega Koga.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR

programme.title: Kikyo foi contaminado pela teia de aranha de Naraku. Para salvá-la, Inuyasha e Kagome precisam da corda do arco no mausoléu do Monte Azusa.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR

programme.title: Kikyo tenta purificar Naraku e seus fragmentos de Shikon. Ela também tenta purificar a vontade de Midoriko que controla os cacos nas pernas de Koga.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR

programme.title: Sesshoumaru pergunta a sua mãe como ele pode expandir o Meido de Tenseiga, o caminho para o submundo. Em resposta, sua mãe usa a pedra Meido que o pai de Sesshoumaru lhe deu.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR

programme.title: O Príncipe das Flores é um demônio que se alimenta de corações tristes ou angustiados. Deslumbrado pela fragrância da flor, Inuyasha está envolvido em um sonho falso.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR

programme.title: O Espelho Demoníaco rouba a energia demoníaca de Tetsusaiga. Inuyasha contra-ataca, apesar de sofrer alguns golpes ferozes, mas todos os seus ataques apontados para o Espelho Demoníaco acabam sendo tomados por Kanna.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR

programme.title: A fim de derrotar os demônios, Sango reveste Hiraikotsu com veneno. Para purificá-lo do veneno, o Mestre das Poções diz que ela deve derrotar o demônio dentro do jarro.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR
programme.sub-title: OS Sentimentos de Sango, A Decisão de Mirok

programme.title: Shishinki, o Ogre da Morte, aparece diante de Sesshomaru, dizendo a ele que Inuyasha e o pai de Sesshoumaru roubaram seu Meido Zangetsuha em uma batalha.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR

programme.title: Sesshoumaru fica furioso quando descobre o segredo por trás do Tenseiga. Totosai tenta convencer Sesshoumaru de que ele irá superar seu pai uma vez que ele seja capaz de abandonar seu apego à espada, bem como seu ódio a Inuyasha.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR

programme.title: Sesshomaru rouba o poder de Tetsusaiga com Tenseiga, fortalecido pela lembrança de Kanna, um fragmento do Mirror Demon. Inuyasha se transforma em sua forma demoníaca e tenta atacar, mas Sesshoumaru dispara seu Meido Zangetsuha.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR

programme.title: A sacerdotisa Hitomiko perdeu a vida nas mãos de Naraku. Mas ela volta à vida e tranca Kagome dentro de uma barreira. Então, o verdadeiro poder espiritual do arco do Monte Azusa se revela!
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR

programme.title: Inuyasha e Kaede tentam descobrir o que está bloqueando os poderes de Kagome.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR

programme.title: Kohaku permanece inconsciente depois de ser encarado por Magatsuhi, a vontade do mal. Kagome está preocupada, mas ela tem que se curvar e estudar para os exames de admissão, então ela decide voltar para casa.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR

programme.title: Sesshoumaru persegue a má vontade, Magatsuhi. Mas é apenas parte de uma armadilha criada por Byakuya dos Sonhos. Magatsuhi encontra Kohaku inconsciente, e ele tenta entregar seu fragmento de Shikon para Naraku.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR

programme.title: Naraku está atrás do último fragmento de Shikon e ele toma Kagome como refém.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR
programme.sub-title: O Momento da Joia Ficar Completa

programme.title: Kagome se forma no ensino médio e retorna à era feudal. Shippo e Kohaku ficam na aldeia de Kaede, enquanto o resto da gangue se dirige para a batalha de Naraku.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR

programme.title: O coração de Inuyasha é devorado pelo veneno da Jóia de Shikon, e ele se transforma em sua forma demoníaca. Ele machuca Kagome e a escuridão em seu coração toma conta dele.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR

programme.title: Os poderes espirituais de Kagome são restaurados e a luz divina é revivida na Jóia Shikon de Naraku. No entanto, Naraku usa isso como um chamariz para atrair Sango em sua armadilha.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR

programme.title: Naraku tem vivido como um demônio apesar de ter um coração humano. Enquanto lutava contra ele, Kagome pergunta sobre seu verdadeiro desejo.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR

programme.title: Naraku se dirige para o Poço do Comedor de Ossos e desaparece! Antes de desaparecer, Naraku faz seu último desejo para Kagome, ferido pelas mãos de Byakuya, ser engolido em Meido, o caminho para o submundo.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR

programme.title: Quando a última pessoa a obter a Jóia Shikon faz o único desejo correto, a jóia será purificada e desaparecerá inteiramente deste mundo.
programme.desc: Inuyasha The Final Act BR

programme.title: Anos após ser selado, Inuyasha, o meio-youkai é acordado por uma garota do ensino médio chamada Agome, que viajou no tempo atraves do poço Come-Ossos.
programme.desc: Inuyasha
programme.sub-title: A Garota que Volta no Tempo e o Garoto Lacrado

programme.title: Concedido o poder de controlar Inuyasha, Agome descobre que ela pode ser a reencarnação da irmã mais velha de Kaede, Kikyo, que selou Inuyasha.
programme.desc: Inuyasha
programme.sub-title: As Pessoas Atrás da Joia de Quatro Almas

programme.title: Agome e Inuyasha precisam das habilidades do outro para reunir os fragmentos dispersos da Jóia de Quatro Almas, mas os dois não se dão bem.
programme.desc: Inuyasha
programme.sub-title: A Volta Através do Poço Come-Ossos

programme.title: De volta ao presente, Agome está relaxando em casa quando Inuyasha vem procurá-la, e ela retorna com ele ao passado para encontrar Yura.
programme.desc: Inuyasha

programme.title: O meio irmão de Inuyasha, Sesshomaru, aparece procurando pelo túmulo de seu pai que era um youkai-cachorro. Agome aprende sobre o passado de Inuyasha.
programme.desc: Inuyasha

programme.title: Apesar da ajuda de Agome em frustrá-lo, Sesshomaru descobre a localização do túmulo do pai de Inuyasha, que contém uma espada que ele deseja.
programme.desc: Inuyasha
programme.sub-title: Tessaiga, O Canino de Aço Destruidor

programme.title: Agome é capaz de puxar a espada Tessaiga para fora do altar, e Sesshomaru tenta matá-la, irritando Inuyasha e provocando um duelo de irmãos.
programme.desc: Inuyasha

programme.title: Inuyasha e Agome encontram um jovem samurai chamado Nobunaga cujo senhor foi possuído por um youkai Sapo, e eles partiram para resgatar uma princesa.

programme.sub-title: O Senhor Feudal Youkai, Sapo Tsukumo

programme.title: Em sua jornada, Inuyasha e Agome encontram Shippo, um jovem youkai raposa que rouba um pedaço da Jóia para vingar seu pai assassinado.
programme.desc: Inuyasha
programme.sub-title: Entra em Cena Shippo! Os Irmãos Youkai Relâmpago

programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: JoJo e seus companheiros são emboscados por Dio e uma horda de zumbis depois de serem atraídos até um cemitério por um garoto chamado Poco.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: O lendário cavaleiro Blueford ressuscita e confia sua espada a JoJo. Tarkus ataca JoJo com força avassaladora.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Clockstoppers: O Filme, (2002, Adventure)
programme.desc: Zak Gibbs (Jesse Bradford, "Hackers") é um adolescente normal que consegue poderes extraordinários após encontrar um relógio misterioso que pode parar o tempo!

programme.title: Império Proibido, (2015, Adventure)
programme.desc: No início do século 18, o cartógrafo Jonathan Green empreende uma viagem científica da Europa para o Oriente. Passando pela Transilvânia e cruzando as montanhas dos Cárpatos, ele encontra uma pequena vila perdida na floresta.

programme.title: Deus da guerra, (2017, Adventure)
programme.desc: Na dinastia Ming, onde o jovem general Qi Jiguang conquista uma importante vitória contra os piratas japoneses, comandando o exército chinês. Quando, quatro anos depois, sua nação é mais uma vez atacada, Qi se vê obrigado a retornar aos campos de batalha.

programme.title: Fanfan La Tulipe, (2003, Adventure)
programme.desc: O habilidoso espadachim e mulherengo Fanfan La Tulipe é obrigado a se juntar ao exército do rei Luís XV pela trambiqueira Adeline La Franchise , que o convence dizendo que assim se casará com uma das filhas do rei.

programme.title: O Mito, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: O arqueólogo Jack continua tendo sonhos recorrentes de uma vida passada, onde ele é o grande general Meng Yi, que jurou proteger uma princesa chamada Ok-Soo. Jack decide ir investigar tudo com seu amigo William.

programme.title: Demolidor - O Homem sem Medo, (2003, Action)
programme.desc: Um homem cegado por resíduos tóxicos, que também ampliaram os seus outros sentidos, luta contra o crime como um super-herói acrobático das artes marciais.

programme.title: Motoqueiro Fantasma: Espírito de Vingança, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: Nove anos após se transformar no temido Motoqueiro Fantasma, Johnny Blaze se refugia para tentar controlar sua maldição e deixá-la escondida da maioria das pessoas. Ele leva uma vida solitária, até ser obrigado a entrar em ação novamente.

programme.title: A Tumba do Dragão, (2014, Adventure)
programme.desc: Travis Preston e sua equipe viajam para a China em busca de uma resposta para os misteriosos assassinatos que começam a levantar suspeitas sobre a existência de uma criatura lendária.

programme.title: Batalha dos Impérios, (2020, Action)
programme.desc: O general romano Lucius lidera uma legião de mil soldados no país e com o comandante do protetorado das Regiões Ocidentais, Huo An, ele luta para derrotar o assassino Tiberius e restaurar a soberania da China.

programme.title: City Hunter: O Caçador de Encrenca, (1993, Comedy)
programme.desc: Ryu Saeba, detetive particular, busca a filha fugitiva de um empresário em um navio cruzeiro sequestrado por bandidos.

programme.title: Sangue Oposto, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Dmitri e James, dois poderosos assassinos de elite contratados pelo governo, se reconectam após seu último trabalho no Sudeste Asiático.

programme.title: Kickboxer: A vingança do dragão, (2016, Action)
programme.desc: O lendário lutador de Muay Thai Tong Po assassina Eric Sloane covardemente em uma luta. O irmão de Eric, Kurt Sloane, que sempre viveu à sua sombra, desencadeia um grande e forte desejo por vingança.

programme.title: Ip Man - O Mestre do Kug Fu, (2020, Action)
programme.desc: Durante o tempo em que foi capitão da polícia na cidade de Foshan, Ip Man é perseguido por um gângster vingativo, enquanto o exército japonês invade a região.

programme.title: Era uma vez na China e na América, (1997, Action)
programme.desc: Jet Li é Wong Fei-Hong, herói chinês que vai à América, é salvo por índios e luta contra a exploração de trabalhadores chineses por um tirano local.

programme.title: O Legado do Grande Mestre, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Mantendo-se discreto depois de ter sido derrotado por Ip Man, Cheung Tin Chi mete-se em sarilhos depois de se envolver numa luta com um estrangeiro poderoso.

programme.title: Honor, (2006, Action)
programme.desc: Dois amigos do mesmo bairro que seguiram caminhos diferentes devem decidir se ficarão do lado da lei ou das gangues quando novos confrontos começarem.

programme.title: Olhos de Dragão, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: Hong usa sua visão moral e habilidades para lutar e salvar um bairro de traficantes de drogas e policiais corruptos.

programme.title: O Matador - Missão Resgate, (2022, Action)
programme.desc: Quando a garota de quem ele está cuidando é sequestrada, um assassino aposentado rapidamente recupera seus instintos assassinos, incendiando a cidade.

programme.title: Retroceder Nunca, Render-se Jamais, (1986, Action)
programme.desc: Jason Stillwell é um fã de Bruce Lee e jovem aprendiz de artes marciais. Após seu pai negar participar de uma gangue de criminosos, eles se mudam de cidade, onde Jason encontrará problemas.

programme.title: My Dear Secretary, (1948, Comedy)
programme.desc: Owen Waterbury, bestselling novelist, recruits aspiring writer Stephanie 'Steve' Gaylord as his latest of many secretaries.

programme.title: My Foolish Heart, (1949, Drama)
programme.desc: After being visited by an old friend, a woman recalls her true love, the man she met and lost years ago.

programme.title: My Friend Irma, (1949, Comedy)
programme.desc: A slapsticky saga related by a comparatively bright brunette dishing the dirt about her dumb blonde roommate. Dean Martin and Jerry Lewis's movie debut.

programme.title: My Friend Irma Goes West, (1950, Comedy)
programme.desc: Singer Steve, friend Seymour and fiance Jane, along with her dizzy blonde room mate Irma, have a series of misadventures on a California-bound train and end up involved with a gang of murderous gangsters in Las Vegas.

programme.title: My Man Godfrey, (1936, Romance)
programme.desc: A scatterbrained socialite hires a vagrant as a family butler...but there's more to Godfrey than meets the eye.

programme.title: My Pal Trigger, (1946, Action)
programme.desc: Roy Rogers goes to jail after hes wrongly accused of killing Gabby Hayes horse in this action packed yarn from Republic Pictures.

programme.title: Night of the Living Dead (1968), (1998, Zombies)
programme.desc: A ragtag group of Pennsylvanians barricade themselves in an old farmhouse to remain safe from a bloodthirsty, flesh-eating breed of monsters who are ravaging the East Coast of the United States.

programme.title: Odds Against Tomorrow, (1959, Crime)
programme.desc: When bigoted ex-con Earl Slater agrees to carry out a heist with a disgraced former cop and his cohorts – one of whom is Black – tensions mount as the job comes together, until Earl’s seething hatred erupts, risking the heist...and their lives!

programme.title: Odd Man Out, (1947, Crime)
programme.desc: A wounded Irish nationalist leader attempts to evade police following a failed robbery in Belfast.

programme.title: Delta Force 2: The Colombian Connection, (1990, Action)
programme.desc: Chuck Norris is in peak form in this explosive action/adventure that brings back one of his most unforgettable characters, Delta Force Colonel Scott McCoy, for a daring mission to destroy a deadly drug cartel led by the ruthless Billy Drago!

programme.title: Olympus Has Fallen, (2013, Adventure)
programme.desc: Secret Service agent Mike Banning finds himself trapped inside the White House in the wake of a terrorist attack and works to rescue the President from his kidnappers.

programme.title: London Has Fallen, (2016, Adventure)
programme.desc: In London for the Prime Minister's funeral, Mike Banning is caught up in a plot to assassinate all the attending world leaders.

programme.title: Killer Elite, (2011, Action)
programme.desc: A special-ops agent must rescue his mentor.

programme.title: Bloodsport, (1988, Action)
programme.desc: Ninjitsu master Frank Dux journeys to Hong Kong to enter the Kumite, the Olympics of martial arts, and meets a beautiful American reporter. Before long he must face Chong-Li, a vicious Korean master of Tae Kwan Do, in a climactic fight to the finish.

programme.title: Free Fire, (2016, Action)
programme.desc: When a black market arms deal goes outrageously wrong, Justine (Brie Larson) finds herself caught in the crossfire, forced to navigate a warehouse full of trigger-happy madmen all hanging on for dear life in this hilarious action-comedy.

programme.title: Proud Mary, (2018, Thriller)
programme.desc: Taraji P. Henson is Mary, a hit woman working for an organized crime family in Boston, whose life is completely turned around when she meets a young boy whose path she crosses when a professional hit goes bad.

programme.title: Gladiator, (2000, Blockbusters)
programme.desc: A man robbed of his name and his dignity strives to win them back, and gain the freedom of his people, in this epic historical drama from director Ridley Scott.

programme.title: Silent Hill: Revelation, (2012, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: Heather Mason and her father have always tried to stay one step ahead of the malevolent forces intent on their destruction. But on the eve of her 18th birthday, a dangerous revelation leads her deeper into a demonic world.

programme.title: Succubus, (2024, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: A new father struggling with fatigue, emotional insecurities, and a failing marriage joins a dating app, only to swipe right on what may be an inhuman presence.

programme.title: Winnie-the-Pooh: Blood and Honey, (2022, Cult Horror)
programme.desc: Winnie-The-Pooh: Blood and Honey follows Pooh and Piglet as they go on a rampage after Christopher Robin abandons them.

programme.title: Studio 666, (2022, Cult Horror)
programme.desc: In Studio 666, the legendary rock band Foo Fighters move into an Encino mansion steeped in grisly rock and roll history to record their much anticipated 10th album.

programme.title: Midsommar, (2019, Horror)
programme.desc: An American couple, their relationship foundering, travel to a fabled Swedish midsummer festival where they become trapped in a sinister nightmare.

programme.title: Vacancy, (2007, Horror)
programme.desc: A suspenseful, classic thriller, in the tradition of Alfred Hitchcock, starring Luke Wilson and Kate Beckinsale, that will keep you on the edge of your seat and your heart pounding! Rated: R

programme.title: Bram Stoker's Dracula, (1992, Thriller)
programme.desc: Gary Oldman, Winona Ryder and Anthony Hopkins star in director Francis Ford Coppola's visually stunning, passionately seductive version of the classic Dracula legend. Rated: R

programme.title: Don't Be Afraid of the Dark, (2010, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: Sally moves to Rhode Island to live with her father and his new girlfriend in their 19th-century mansion. While exploring the house, Sally starts to hear voices coming from creatures in the basement whose hidden agenda is to claim her as one of their own.

programme.title: Death Note: Confession
programme.desc: Light goes to Aoyama to discover the identity of the second Kira before L becomes more suspicious.

programme.title: Death Note: Friend
programme.desc: Light and Misa show each other their Death Notes, and Light asks Misa to have her shinigami Rem get rid of L.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: To save his squad, Bucciarati risks all by grabbing hold of Prosciutto and hurling himself off the speeding train, only to be saved by Pesci’s hook. Now, as Pesci savagely fishes for his victim’s heart, Bucciarati’s resolve reaches stunning heights.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bucciarati and crew head to Venice by car, after a near-death encounter with Pesci. Unbeknownst to them, Melone from the Hitman Team has created an atomizing ancillary Stand from Bruno’s blood and the body of an unsuspecting female train passenger.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Giorno fights transmutation with transmutation as he weaponizes his own severed hand and imbues inanimate objects with life against Melone’s baby Stand. Giorno and team now must learn that the road ahead to Santa Lucia train station is paved with ice.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Ghiaccio's Stand, White Ice is able to envelop him like a bodysuit and able to freeze everything around him to extremely low temperatures. Giorno and Mista somewhat make it to Venice, despite being partially frozen by Ghiaccio...

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: By revealing to each other a fearless embrace of the unknown, Giorno and Mista emerge victorious against Ghiaccio. Now, a single member of Bruno’s group must face a single bell tower, a single elevator shaft, and a single menacing task.
programme.sub-title: The Final Mission From the Boss

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: In the crypt of a Venetian church, Bruno discovers not only the brutal truth behind the Boss’s true intentions but also the unstoppable Stand power he wields, a power that leaves Bruno in a pool of blood and in a moral quandary.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Peer into the complex personal pasts of Bucciarati and his fellow gang members, and uncover the thread that unites this diverse group of fighters into a single team and single expression of resolve.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bruno and team, now self-chosen traitors, learn from Trish during a moment of calm at a Venetian café a trip to Sardegna is vital. Chaos, then, erupts as Narancia loses his tongue and ability to speak the truth.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: As Giorno is teleported between puddles with Squalo’s shark attached firmly to his jugular, Narancia tries to sniff out the perpetrator using his CO2 tracer but is inhibited by Tiziano’s tongue-fusing Stand, frustrating himself and Bruno’s team.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bruno et al head to Marco Polo airport to venture to Sardegna to discover the truth behind Trish’s father. On the tarmac, however, is a swollen, neckless Stand user who, the team discovers while airborne, is linked to the freshly severed fingers onboard

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Palm decides to tell the King where Komugi is, on one condition...

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: The battle between humans and the Chimera Ants ends.
programme.sub-title: Homecoming x And x Real Name

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: The executive council of the Hunter Association, known as the Zodiacs, are summoned to discuss the election of a new chairman.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: An election is held to determine Chairman Netero's successor.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: A closely guarded Zoldyck family secret is revealed.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Killua defies his family's wishes in order to revive Gon.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: The fourth round of voting to select the new chairman is held.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Hisoka appears before Gotoh and the other butlers who are trying to protect Killua.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: The remaining eight candidates now compete in the 5th round of voting to select the new chairman.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: The 7th round of voting is held and the field narrows to the remaining 4 candidates.

programme.title: Death Note: Doubt
programme.desc: L's suspicion of Light deepens, compelling him to invite Light into the investigation.

programme.title: Death Note: Assault
programme.desc: As predicted on the tapes sent to Sakura TV, news anchors and commentators who expressed doubt about Kira die one by one.

programme.title: Death Note: Love

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Cooley High, (1975, Comedy)
programme.desc: Set in 1964 Chicago, "Cooley High" is a slice-of-life tale of two high school students--best friends--coping with the challenges of everyday life and growing up in the shadows of the housing projects. Glynn Turman and Laurence-Hilton Jacobs star.

programme.title: Barbershop, (2002, Comedy)
programme.desc: Calvin, who inherited a struggling barbershop, views the shop as nothing but a burden and a waste of his time. After selling the shop to a local loan shark, Calvin slowly begins to see his father's vision and legacy.

programme.title: Barbershop 2: Back in Business, (2004, Comedy)
programme.desc: The Barbershop is threatened by the arrival of a hip, well-financed chain barbershop that's about to open next door.

programme.title: Beauty Shop, (2005, Comedy)
programme.desc: Gina is a long way from the Barbershop - she's moved from Chicago to Atlanta and buys a rundown salon and inherits a motley group of stylists and a colorful clientele. It's a rocky road to fulfilling her dreams, but you can't keep a good woman down!

programme.title: Barbershop: The Next Cut, (2016, Comedy)
programme.desc: It's been more than 10 years since our last appointment at Calvin's Barbershop. Ice Cube, Cedric the Entertainer and the whole crew are back together for a quick trim, some good conversation, a little gossip...and to save their neighborhood!

programme.title: I Got The Hook Up, (1998, Comedy)
programme.desc: Two small time scam artists, Black and Blue, sell boom boxes and broken TVs from their van at the parking lot. When, by mistake, a shipment of cellular phones gets to them, it doesn't take long before FBI and gangsters are after them.

programme.title: Mo' Money, (1992, Comedy)
programme.desc: You can never be too rich...or too funny. Comedian Damon Wayans brings his rogue's gallery of outrageous characters to this action-filled comedy about a con artist who tries to go straight, but keeps getting pulled in the wrong direction.

programme.title: Dreamgirls, (2006, Musical)
programme.desc: With showstopping performances by a star-studded cast, Dreamgirls soars with the amazing story of three female singers who learn that anything is possible when you hold on to your dreams.

programme.title: Kill Zone 2, (2015, Action)
programme.desc: When his cover gets blown, a Hong Kong cop (Wu Jing) lands in a Thai prison where the warden works with a criminal mastermind (Louis Koo) to harvest organs.

programme.title: Seven Swords, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: Seven exceptional warriors band together to protect a village from bounty hunters.

programme.title: 7 Assassins, (2013, Action)
programme.desc: When gold goes missing in ancient China, royal guards entrusted with its recovery realize they are not the only people in pursuit.

programme.title: 11 Rebels, (2025, Adventure)
programme.desc: In the final days of the samurai, 11 condemned warriors are offered redemption—defend a mountain pass or die forgotten. Led by ex-samurai, Tatsukoro (Takayuki Yamada), they face a brutal siege in a last stand of steel, honor, and blood.

programme.title: 13 Assassins, (2011, Action)
programme.desc: A group of elite samurai are secretly enlisted to bring down a sadistic lord.

programme.title: 14 Blades, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: Qinglong (Action icon Donnie Yen) is a legendary royal guard trained in a clandestine form of combat from childhood in order to devote his life and lethal prowess to the service of the Emperor.

programme.title: Ip Man, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: Ip Man is the award-winning film adaptation about the life story of Ip Man, the grandmaster of the Wing Chun style of kung fu and sifu of legendary martial arts superstar, Bruce Lee.

programme.title: Ip Man 2, (2010, Action)
programme.desc: Newly arrived in Hong Kong, martial arts instructor Ip Man encounters stiff opposition when he begins teaching the Wing Chun fighting style. But instead of bowing to his rivals' demands, he perseveres and retaliates with amazing speed and power.

programme.title: Eurotrip, (2004, Comedy)
programme.desc: Europe will never be the same again after Scotty Thomas and his buddies take off for the express to excess! They're hooking up with hot strangers and jamming all the extreme insanity they can into the wildest trip of their lives!

programme.title: Bandits, (2001, Comedy)
programme.desc: The suave Joe and his hypochondriac partner Terry have escaped from prison. Cutting a swath from Oregon through California, these fugitives rob banks in order to finance their scheme for a new life south of the Border.

programme.title: Jackass: The Movie, (2002, Comedy)
programme.desc: All the jackasses you love from the MTV series are back performing stunts no one would let them pull on television.

programme.title: Jackass Number Two, (2006, Comedy)
programme.desc: Prepare yourself for fits of uncontrollable laughter and waves of nausea as the guys launch their battered bodies into an onslaught of absurd situations.

programme.title: Jackass 2.5, (2007, Comedy)
programme.desc: You'll laugh till it hurts as Johnny Knoxville and the guys take you behind the scenes with Jackass 2.5, talking about this excess of never-before-seen stunts in hilarious new interviews.

programme.title: Jackass 3, (2010, Comedy)
programme.desc: The jackass guys are back, so brace yourself for unbelievable and totally explicit stunts from the idiots you've come to know and love from a safe and sanitary distance!

programme.title: Jackass 3, (2010, Comedy)
programme.desc: The boys of Jackass are at it again with an all-new movie loaded with outrageous, idiotic stunts you shouldn't try at home. You won't want to miss this big time batch of pranks, stupidity and mayhem from your favorite jackasses.

programme.title: Jackass Presents: Bad Grandpa, (2013, Comedy)
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville reprises his jackass role as 86-year-old Irving Zisman in the story of an old man saddled with the care of his grandson. The two hustle their way across America on an outrageous road trip pranking unsuspecting, real-life people.

programme.title: Jackass: The Movie, (2002, Comedy)
programme.desc: All the jackasses you love from the MTV series are back performing stunts no one would let them pull on television.

programme.title: Jane Eyre, (1997, Drama)
programme.desc: Jane Eyre is a young woman whose will to overcome a life of hardship leads her into a passionate romance with a handsome -- and mysterious -- gentleman.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love, (1998, Drama)
programme.desc: After providing inspiration to Will Shakespeare, his case of writer's block cured, and a taste for romance rekindled by the mysterious Lady Viola. Gwyneth Paltrow, Joseph Fiennes, Ben Affleck, and Dame Judi Dench star in this Best Picture winner.

programme.title: Romeo and Juliet, (2013, Drama)
programme.desc: Adapted by Julian Fellowes (Downtown Abbey) from the play by William Shakespeare.

programme.title: Finding Neverland, (2004, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: Both fantasy and everyday reality meld in this unforgettable acclaimed drama exploring the origins of one of the greatest fables of all time—PETER PAN. Nominated for seven Academy Awards, including Best Picture.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love, (1998, Drama)
programme.desc: After providing inspiration to Will Shakespeare, his case of writer's block cured, and a taste for romance rekindled by the mysterious Lady Viola. Gwyneth Paltrow, Joseph Fiennes, Ben Affleck, and Dame Judi Dench star in this Best Picture winner.

programme.title: A Walk On The Moon, (1999, Drama)
programme.desc: In the summer of 1969, Pearl (Diane Lane) meets a free-spirited, sexy stranger (Viggo Mortensen), while on yet another tedious vacation with her husband. She is soon doing the unthinkable: having a daring, passionate affair.

programme.title: Finding Neverland, (2004, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: Both fantasy and everyday reality meld in this unforgettable acclaimed drama exploring the origins of one of the greatest fables of all time—PETER PAN. Nominated for seven Academy Awards, including Best Picture.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love, (1998, Drama)
programme.desc: After providing inspiration to Will Shakespeare, his case of writer's block cured, and a taste for romance rekindled by the mysterious Lady Viola. Gwyneth Paltrow, Joseph Fiennes, Ben Affleck, and Dame Judi Dench star in this Best Picture winner.

programme.title: Honest Thief, (2020, Action)
programme.desc: Wanting to lead an honest life, a notorious bank robber (Liam Neeson) turns himself in, only to be double-crossed by two ruthless FBI agents.

programme.title: Collateral, (2004, Action)
programme.desc: Vincent is a cool, calculating contract killer at the top of his game. Max is a cabbie with big dreams and no results. On this fateful night, Max has to transport Vincent on his next job - one night, five stops, five hits and a getaway.

programme.title: Out of Time, (2003, Thriller)
programme.desc: Denzel Washington stars in this spell-binding thriller as the Chief of Police of a small town who finds himself caught in the eye of a storm as he investigates the murder of a woman he was secretly seeing….because all the evidence points to him!

programme.title: F/X, (1986, Thriller)
programme.desc: Rollie Tyler, a movie special-effects man, accepts $30,000 from the Justice Department's Witness Relocation Program to stage the fake assassination of a mob figure who has agreed to name names.

programme.title: Limitless, (2011, Thriller)
programme.desc: A mysterious pill that enables the user to access 100% of his brain's abilities transforms a struggling writer into a financial wizard, but it also puts him in a new world with many dangers.

programme.title: Collateral, (2004, Action)
programme.desc: Vincent is a cool, calculating contract killer at the top of his game. Max is a cabbie with big dreams and no results. On this fateful night, Max has to transport Vincent on his next job - one night, five stops, five hits and a getaway.

programme.title: Lord of War, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: Oscar winner Nicolas Cage stars in this taut, action-packed tale of a notorious arms dealer who sold weapons to dictators and successfully outran the law for nearly twenty years.

programme.title: Jagged Edge, (1985, Thriller)
programme.desc: A grisly homicide, a sensational trial, a forbidden affair it's JAGGED EDGE, a razor-sharp suspense thriller about crime, punishment and passion. Jeff Bridges is the prime suspect and Glenn Close plays the attorney who falls in love with him. rated -R

programme.title: The Zone of Interest, (2023, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: The commandant of Auschwitz, Rudolf Höss, and his wife Hedwig, strive to build a dream life for their family in a house and garden next to the camp. A hypnotic and deeply chilling masterpiece from filmmaker Jonathan Glazer (Under the Skin).

programme.title: Terms of Endearment, (1983, Drama)
programme.desc: Terms of Endearment dazzled critics and audiences alike with its believable, insightful story of two captivating people, mother and daughter, unforgettably played by Shirley MacLaine and Debra Winger.

programme.title: Boyhood, (2014, Drama)
programme.desc: Filmed over twelve years with the same cast, Richard Linklater's acclaimed smash hit is a groundbreaking celebration of life. Stars Ethan Hawke and Patricia Arquette.

programme.title: Vicky Cristina Barcelona, (2008, Drama)
programme.desc: Two girlfriends on a summer holiday in Spain became enamored with the same painter, fully unaware that his ex-wife, with whom he still has a tempestuous relationship, is about to re-enter the picture.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment, (1983, Drama)
programme.desc: Terms of Endearment dazzled critics and audiences alike with its believable, insightful story of two captivating people, mother and daughter, unforgettably played by Shirley MacLaine and Debra Winger.

programme.title: A Home of Our Own, (1993, Drama)
programme.desc: A single mother leaves Los Angeles with her six children and moves to Idaho. She buys a broken-down house without a roof, doors or windows. Weathering natural disasters and personal conflict, they rebuild the house and their lives.

programme.title: Tender Mercies, (1983, Drama)
programme.desc: Winner of two Academy Awards®, TENDER MERCIES is a compassionate love story tracing the relationship between a burnt-out country western star and the young widow he meets in a small Texas motel.

programme.title: Hatfields and McCoys: Bad Blood, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: Starring Jeff Fahey, Perry King and Christian Slater. When a Union soldier on his way home crosses paths with a family of Confederate supporters, a bloody feud erupts between neighboring families.

programme.title: Another Pair of Aces, (1991, Action)
programme.desc: Starring Willie Nelson and Kris Kristofferson. A gambler, a Texas Ranger and an FBI agent investigate a series of vigilante murders.

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!, (1969, Western)
programme.desc: James Garner stars in this rollicking western spoof that has him taking on the job of a frontier town sheriff who must fend off villains (led by Walter Brennen) from every direction...all without breaking a sweat or dirtying his shiny black boots!

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter, (1971, Western)
programme.desc: James Garner is back in the saddle again as hustler Latigo Smith whose latest con is passing off cowhand Jug (Jack Elam) as the dreaded gunman Swifty Morgan. But when the real Swifty shows up, the Wild West is going to get a whole lot wackier!

programme.title: A Fistful Of Dynamite, (1972, Western)
programme.desc: The results are explosive when an Irish terrorist (James Coburn) with a dynamite obsession teams up with a Mexican peasant-turned- revolutionary (Rod Steiger) in this action-packed tale of power and politics. Directed by the legendary Sergio Leone.

programme.title: Hatfields and McCoys: Bad Blood, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: Starring Jeff Fahey, Perry King and Christian Slater. When a Union soldier on his way home crosses paths with a family of Confederate supporters, a bloody feud erupts between neighboring families.

programme.title: Sweet Country, (2018, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: Australian western set on the Northern Territory frontier in the 1920s, where justice itself is put on trial when an aged Aboriginal farmhand shoots a white man in self-defense and goes on the run as a posse gathers to hunt him down.

programme.title: Posse, (1993, Western)
programme.desc: There's action galore in this off-beat western that features a group of mostly black infantrymen who return from the Spanish-American War with a cache of gold. The men travel to the West where their leader searches for the men who lynched his father.

programme.title: The Man Who Came Back, (2009, Western)
programme.desc: Based on one of the bloodiest labor strikes in the history of the United States, THE MAN WHO CAME BACK is a story of murder, conspiracy and one man's revenge.

programme.title: Hercules, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: The most towering myth of all time meets up with the mission of a real man in this action-adventure thriller that reveals the famed symbol of courage as he’s never been seen before: finding the hero’s heart that beats beneath his colossal image.

programme.title: The Core, (2003, Action)
programme.desc: The Earth has stopped rotating because of a change in the planet's core temperature. To restore the normal temperature, astronauts must travel to the center and detonate a nuclear bomb before the core superheats and destroys all life on the surface.

programme.title: Aeon Flux, (2005, Thriller)
programme.desc: Academy Award-winner Charlize Theron stars as Aeon Flux, the underground operative fighting totalitarian rule in 25th-century Earth's last living city.

programme.title: The Adventures of SharkBoy and Lavagirl, (2005, Adventure)
programme.desc: From Robert Rodriguez, the director of the SPY KIDS franchise comes another superhero adventure for the entire family. This is the extraordinary tale of a girl with the force of a volcano who teams up with a boy raised by Great White sharks.

programme.title: Cloverfield, (2007, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Five young New Yorkers face a life or death struggle in order to escape from the city when a monster the size of a skyscraper suddenly appears.

programme.title: Eagle Eye, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf and Michelle Monaghan star as two strangers trying to escape danger when they are ripped from their ordinary lives and 'activated' as part of a hightech assassination plot.

programme.title: Aeon Flux, (2005, Thriller)
programme.desc: Academy Award-winner Charlize Theron stars as Aeon Flux, the underground operative fighting totalitarian rule in 25th-century Earth's last living city.

programme.title: Clockstoppers, (2002, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A teenager (Jesse Bradford) accidentally activates a wristwatch that allows him to make time stand still.

programme.title: The Usual Suspects, (1995, Thriller)
programme.desc: A gruesome scene adorns a pier in San Pedro, south of Los Angeles. Twenty-seven dead bodies. A burned-out ship smoldering in the harbor.

programme.title: The Iron Lady, (2011, Biographical Drama)
programme.desc: OSCAR-winning Meryl Streep is Margaret Thatcher in this insightful and intimate portrait of the first and only female Prime Minister of the United Kingdom.

programme.title: Room, (2015, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: Kidnapped and confined to a windowless room, Ma uses imagination to give Jack a fulfilling life. At a breaking point, they enact a risky plan to escape which ultimately brings them face-to-face with the scariest thing yet: the real world.

programme.title: Monster's Ball, (2001, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: MONSTER'S BALL is a hard-hitting Southern drama tempered by a story of powerful life-changing love.

programme.title: Dead Man Walking, (1996, Courtroom Drama)
programme.desc: In an Oscar-winning role, Susan Sarandon portrays Sister Helen Prejean, a spiritual woman who embarks on a dangerous quest with a convicted killer and the profound changes it makes in her life.

programme.title: Blue Sky, (1994, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: Uprooting his family after being assigned to a remote testing facility in Alabama, nuclear engineer Hank Marshall is faced with a moral decision as an opponent of the atmospheric tests he’s asked to complete.

programme.title: The Accused, (1988, Courtroom Drama)
programme.desc: Jodie Foster gives an Oscar-winning performance as the hard, independent Sarah Tobias, who is assaulted in the back of a neighborhood bar. But that is only the beginning of her ordeal.

programme.title: The Iron Lady, (2011, Biographical Drama)
programme.desc: OSCAR-winning Meryl Streep is Margaret Thatcher in this insightful and intimate portrait of the first and only female Prime Minister of the United Kingdom.

programme.title: Coherence, (2013, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In this mind-bending sci-fi thriller, 8 friends at a dinner party start experiencing strange and mysterious events on the night a comet is passing close to Earth. Soon it becomes clear that nothing and no one are what they appear.

programme.title: Night of the Comet, (1984, Thriller)
programme.desc: A huge comet passes near the earth, vaporizing nearly the whole planet. But a few partially exposed people are now blood-thirsty zombies, and they begin a hunt for the remaining humans.

programme.title: Species, (1995, Science fiction)
programme.desc: She's beautiful, seductive, intelligent, and her charms could spell doom for the entire human race! Ben Kingsley, Forrest Whitaker, and Natasha Henstridge star in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi hit.

programme.title: Species II, (1998, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A trio of American astronauts become instant heroes as they plant the Stars and Stripes on Mars before beginning the voyage home. But back on their ship, something else has set its sights on Earth, something whose relatives have already paid us a visit.

programme.title: Species III, (2004, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In the ongoing fight for supremacy between mankind and the human-alien hybrids, a fatal hybrid weakness has given humans the advantage. Until now.

programme.title: Species: The Awakening, (2007, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When Miranda Hollander suffers a strange blackout, she learns her true origin as a human-alien hybrid and becomes locked in battle with other hybrids. But time is running out…will she surrender to her own killer instincts in the search for a mate?

programme.title: King Solomon's Mines, (1985, Adventure)
programme.desc: Experience wild stunts, romance and heart-pounding excitement with Richard Chamberlain as a soldier of fortune who unwittingly gets tied into a young woman's (Sharon Stone) search for her missing father.

programme.title: Allan Quatermain and the Lost City of Gold, (1986, Adventure)
programme.desc: In this sequel to "King Solomon's Mines," Allan Quatermain (Richard Chamberlain) and Jesse Huston (Sharon Stone) once again travel to Africa on a journey of uncharted pathways, in search of a lost brother and a Lost City of Gold!

programme.title: The Dark Crystal, (1982, Science fiction)
programme.desc: On another planet in the distant past, a Gelfling embarks on a quest to find the missing shard of a magical crystal, and to restore order to his world.

programme.title: Texas Chainsaw, (1970, Horror)
programme.desc: A young woman inherits an isolated mansion from a distant relative, but an unspeakable horror awaits her in the mansion's dank cellars.

programme.title: Mandy, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: When a cult attacks, the shocking assault leads to vengeance.

programme.title: Clive Barker's Lord Of Illusions, (1995, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: Scott Bakula ("Sibling Rivalry") portrays Harry D’Amour, a private detective visiting Los Angeles on a routine investigation. Harry gets more than he bargains for when he encounters Philip Swan (Kevin J. O’Connor, "The Mummy").

programme.title: Backwoods, (2008, Horror)
programme.desc: A brash executive sees human survival as a skill to be honed — both in and out of the boardroom. When he takes his employees on a weekend getaway, they are plunged into a fight for survival.

programme.title: Terrifier, (2018, Horror)
programme.desc: Art The Clown sets his sights on three young women, along with anyone else that gets in his way.

programme.title: Terrifier 2, (2022, Horror)
programme.desc: After being resurrected by a sinister entity, Art the Clown returns to Miles County where he begins to target a teenage girl and her younger brother on Halloween.

programme.title: Terrifier 3, (2024, Horror)
programme.desc: Art the Clown is set to unleash chaos on the unsuspecting residents of Miles County as they peacefully drift off to sleep on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre: 40th Anniversary, (1974, Horror)
programme.desc: Five youths on a weekend getaway fall prey to a depraved family of cannibals in Tobe Hooper's masterpiece of subversive horror, now featuring a 4k digital transfer and all-new surround sound mix supervised by the director.

programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Battle in the Heat! Luffy vs. the Giant Dragon!

programme.title: Luffy gets up close and personal with a torso-less Samurai! Elsewhere, Nami, Sanji, Chopper, and Franky find themselves imprisoned with the pieces of a human face!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Straw Hats Stunned! Enter: A Samurai’s Horrifying Severed Head!

programme.title: Luffy makes friends with a Centaur, Franky uses a cola-powered laser to break out of the clink, and Sanji takes a chance on a body-less Samurai!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Startling! The Secret of the Island Is Finally Revealed!

programme.title: Nami's soft spot for children prompts her to call off the escape and declare war on anyone who makes a kid cry. Meanwhile, Luffy and the gang take a banana boat to the icy side of the island!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Save the Children! The Straw Hats Start to Fight!

programme.title: Luffy's group finds themselves up against a gang of centaurs, Brook battles the torso of a surly samurai, and Captain Smoker encounters someone highly unexpected!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Swordplay Showdown! Brook vs. the Mysterious Torso Samurai!

programme.title: Nami and Chopper seek a safe exit for the children, Luffy's group hopes to avoid a perilous plunge into icy waters, and Captain Smoker faces off against Trafalgar Law!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Luffy's group takes a deadly plunge into icy waters, and Trafalgar Law uses his unique abilities to rearrange Nami's group and cast our heroes into chaotic confusion!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: In a Real Pinch! Luffy Sinks into the Ice-Cold Lake!

programme.title: While Luffy and his mates race toward a reunion, Admiral Smoker struggles to survive a heart-stopping showdown with Trafalgar Law!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Collision! Law vs. Vice Admiral Smoker!

programme.title: Luffy is excited to once again cross paths with Trafalgar Law, but a reunion with his mixed up crew – and the loss of his extra legs – quickly dampens the captain's enthusiasm!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Meeting Again After Two Years! Luffy and Law!

programme.title: While Captain Smoker determines his next move, a very large pirate with alligator legs tells Luffy and the Straw Hats the true story of Punk Hazard's mysterious transformation!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Worst in the World! A Scientist of Terror - Caesar!

programme.title: In the aftermath of Toriko, Luffy, and Goku's three-way tie in the World's Best Eating Competition, the festivities are interrupted by the sudden appearance of a monster that threatens to consume every living thing on earth.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: History’s Strongest Collaboration vs. Glutton of the Sea

programme.title: The giant children fly into a mysterious rage, and Chopper discovers the true reason for their unusual condition! Meanwhile, Zoro, Brook, and Sanji cross paths with a dangerous duo!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Chopper's Fury! The Master's Inhumane Experiment!

programme.title: The story of how Trafalgar Law arrived at Punk Hazard is revealed, and the Yeti Cool Brothers set their sights on a showdown with the Straw Hats!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: To Annihilate the Straw Hats! Legendary Assassins Descend!

programme.title: Luffy tries to chase down the Yetti Cool Brothers, but Franky – still trapped in Chopper's Body – makes his mission extremely difficult. Just when all appears lost, an unexpected ally lends a hand!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Save Nami! Luffy's Fight on the Snow-Capped Mountains!

programme.title: Luffy agrees to an alliance with Trafalgar Law, but the Straw Hats refuse to leave the island until the children are safe. Meanwhile, the gaseous master unleashes something very deadly!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Formed! Luffy and Law's Pirate Alliance!

programme.title: Zoro, Sanji, and Brook continue their search for the samurai, Trafalgar tries to sneak Chopper into the laboratory, and Luffy boldly challenges the Master!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Capture M! The Pirate Alliance's Operation Launches!

programme.title: Luffy's battle with his old nemesis Smoker is interrupted by the arrival of a terrifying toxic blob – and the evil genius who created the monster!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: On the Verge of Annihilation! A Deadly Monster Comes Flying In!

programme.title: The Straw Hats make a valiant push to capture Caesar Clown - Luffy matches his Armament Haki with Clown's powerful Gas-Gas Fruit powers! The battle turns in favor of the Straw Hats, but underestimating Clown's abilities may have deadly consequences!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: An Intense Battle! Caesar Exercises His True Power!

programme.title: Trafalgar Law finds trouble in the form of an old acquaintance, Chopper investigates the Master's lab, and the mysterious Samurai shows what he can do with a full body!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Samurai Who Can Cut Fire! Foxfire Kin'emon!

programme.title: The Master gathers his young test subjects, shocking secret identities are finally revealed, and the poisonous purple blob continues its march across the island!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Shocking! The True Identity of the Mystery Man Vergo!

programme.title: Nami and Usopp get an unexpected helping hand in their fight to save the children, Chopper plots a daring escape attempt, and the Master markets his greatest weapon!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Save the Children! The Master's Evil Hands Close In!

programme.title: A desperate need for candy leads the children to return to the lab, and Caesar plans to show the world the new and improved version of Smiley!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Shaking Up the New World! Caesar's Horrendous Experiment!

programme.title: The Island, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: A man goes on the run after he discovers that he is actually a "harvested being", and is being kept along with others in a utopian facility.

programme.title: World War Z, (2013, Blockbusters)
programme.desc: World War Z is the fast-paced, pulse-pounding epic of the potential last days of the human race. Former United Nations employee Gerry Lane (Brad Pitt) is called in to help stop the pandemic that has spread around the world.

programme.title: Apocalypto, (2006, Action)
programme.desc: As the Mayan kingdom faces its decline, a young man is taken on a perilous journey to a world ruled by fear and oppression.

programme.title: Annihilation, (2018, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A biologist and former solider (Natalie Portman) must lead a mission into a mysterious quarantine zone known as The Shimmer, a beautiful but deadly world of mutated landscapes and creatures that threatens all life on Earth. Also starring Oscar Isaac.

programme.title: Snowpiercer, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: After a failed global-warming experiment, a post-apocalyptic Ice Age has killed off nearly all life on the planet.

programme.title: World War Z, (2013, Blockbusters)
programme.desc: World War Z is the fast-paced, pulse-pounding epic of the potential last days of the human race. Former United Nations employee Gerry Lane (Brad Pitt) is called in to help stop the pandemic that has spread around the world.

programme.title: Starship Troopers, (1997, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Courageous soldiers travel to the distant and desolate Klendathu system for the ultimate showdown between the species.

programme.title: Apache Country, (1952, Western)
programme.desc: Cavalry scouts Gene Autry & Pat Buttram are ordered to break up a ring which uses raids to cover up its activities. Carolina Cotton assists Gene and Pat, while seeking revenge against the gang leader.

programme.title: Barbed Wire, (1952, Western)
programme.desc: In 1878, Gene Autry is a cattle buyer who tries to settle a battle between the cattlemen and homesteaders, when the latter are worked up into a feverish pitch by unscrupulous landowner Steve Rutledge.

programme.title: The Way West, (1967, Western)
programme.desc: Icons Kirk Douglas, Robert Mitchum and Richard Widmark star in this sumptuous, epic tale of the brave men and women in the U.S. who left the comfort and safety of life in the East for the promise of free land a better life in the untamed West.

programme.title: Five Guns To Tombstone, (1960, Western)
programme.desc: A reformed outlaw is living a clean life until his no-good brother who just escaped from prison ropes him into pulling a robbery. Now Billy has his own plan...to prevent it. And all he needs is his six shooters and a little luck.

programme.title: The Gunfighter, (1950, Western)
programme.desc: A retired gunslinger is forced to strap on his six-shooters once again by the vengeful brothers of a man he killed in self-defense.

programme.title: Sabata, (1969, Western)
programme.desc: Get ready for fast-paced, explosive action as Lee Van Cleef stars as Sabata, the mysterious, steely-eyed gunslinger who, after he discovers the masterminds behind an elaborate bank heist, imposes his bullet-laced brand of justice on a guilty town.

programme.title: Adios, Sabata, (1970, Action)
programme.desc: Under the brutal rule of garrison leader Col. Skimmel, a group of Mexican revolutionaries hire gunslinger Sabata (Yul Brynner) to rob a transport of gold in order to buy weapons. But the Colonel has other plans...taking the gold for himself.

programme.title: Return of Sabata, (1971, Western)
programme.desc: The great Lee Van Cleef ('Death Rides a Horse') returns as the famous freewheeling gunslinger Sabata. In this third and final go-round for the enigmatic sharpshooter, Sabata seeks revenge when a band of desperadoes bilks him out of $5,000.

programme.title: Chato's Land, (1972, Western)
programme.desc: Chato, a half-Apache horseman, is on the run from a blood-thirsty posse led by an ex-Confederate officer, who is determined to see him dead. Eventually, the pursued and the pursuers will become reversed, thanks to the unforgiving, cruel desert.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: In 1965, America is at war with North Vietnam and Lt. Col. Hal Moore prepares his troops for one of the most violent battles in U.S. History: “The Valley of Death”.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers, (2006, War Drama)
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Clint Eastwood and Academy Award-winner Steven Spielberg, comes the life stories of the six men who raised the flag at The Battle of Iwo Jima, a turning point in WWII.

programme.title: Defiance, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: Defiance is a riveting adventure that showcases the extraordinary true story of the Bielski brothers, simple farmers -outnumbered and outgunned- who turned a group of war refugees into powerful freedom fighters.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: In 1965, America is at war with North Vietnam and Lt. Col. Hal Moore prepares his troops for one of the most violent battles in U.S. History: “The Valley of Death”.

programme.title: Anjos da Noite, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Selene, uma guerreira vampira, está imersa em um conflito entre vampiros e lobisomens, enquanto se apaixona por Michael, um humano que é procurado por lobisomens por razões desconhecidas. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Kate Beckinsale, Scott Speedman, Michael Sheen Diretor: Len Wiseman

programme.title: Dose dupla, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Dois agentes especiais precisam se unir contra um cartel de drogas mexicano depois que uma operação secreta acaba gerando resultados catastróficos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Denzel Washington, Mark Wahlberg, Paula Patton Diretor: Baltasar Kormákur

programme.title: Garota Exemplar, (2014)
programme.desc: 2014. Com o desaparecimento de sua esposa tornando-se o centro de um intenso circo midiático, um homem vê os holofotes voltarem-se para ele quando surge a suspeita de que ele talvez não seja inocente. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Tyler Perry, Ben Affleck, Rosamund Pike, Carrie Coon, Neil Patrick Harris Diretor: David Fincher

programme.title: Imortais, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Teseu é um homem mortal escolhido por Zeus para liderar a luta contra o cruel rei Hiperião, que está causando estragos por toda a Grécia para obter uma arma capaz de destruir a humanidade. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Henry Cavill, Mickey Rourke, Luke Evans, Freida Pinto Diretor: Tarsem Singh

programme.title: A Grande Aposta, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. Em 2006, um grupo de investidores apostou contra o mercado hipotecário dos Estados Unidos. Esta investigação revela o quão defeituoso e corrupto é o mercado. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Ryan Gosling, Rudy Eisenzopf, Casey Groves, Charlie Talbert, Christian Bale Diretor: Adam McKay

programme.title: Birdman ou (A Inesperada Virtude da Ignorância), (2014)
programme.desc: 2014. O ator Riggan Thomson é mais conhecido por seu papel no filme de mais de vinte anos atrás como o super-herói dos quadrinhos Birdman, no blockbuster de mesmo nome e suas duas sequências igualmente populares. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Michael Keaton, Emma Stone, Kenny Chin, Zach Galifianakis Diretor: Alejandro G. Iñárritu

programme.title: Bohemian Rhapsody, (2018)
programme.desc: 2018. É a história da lendária banda de rock Queen e de seu vocalista principal, Freddie Mercury, e os eventos que levaram ao seu famoso show no Live Aid em 1985. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Rami Malek, Lucy Boynton, Gwilym Lee, Ben Hardy, Joseph Mazzello Diretor: Bryan Singer

programme.title: Show de Vizinha, (2004)
programme.desc: 2004. Um estudante do ensino médio se apaixona por sua vizinha, e descobre que ela é uma atriz pornô. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Emile Hirsch, Elisha Cuthbert, Timothy Olyphant Diretor: Luke Greenfield

programme.title: Los Angeles: Cidade Proibida, (1997)
programme.desc: 1997. À medida que a corrupção cresce na Los Angeles dos anos 50, três policiais - um rigoroso, outro brutal e outro sórdido - investigam uma série de assassinatos com seu próprio estilo de justiça. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Kevin Spacey, Russell Crowe, Guy Pearce, James Cromwell, Kim Basinger Diretor: Curtis Hanson

programme.title: Merchant of Venice, (2004)
programme.desc: 2004. Em uma versão decadente da Veneza renascentista, um jovem nobre chamado Bassanio procura cortejar a adorável Pórcia, mas não tem dinheiro para viajar até sua propriedade. Ele busca o apoio de seu amigo, o comerciante Antonio; Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Al Pacino, Jeremy Irons, Joseph Fiennes, Lynn Collins Diretor: Michael Radford

programme.title: O Fantástico Sr. Raposo, (2009)
programme.desc: 2009. Uma raposa urbana não consegue resistir à tentação de voltar a suas aventuras de assaltante de fazendas e agora precisa ajudar sua comunidade a sobreviver às represálias dos fazendeiros. Gêneros: Children & Family Elenco: George Clooney, Meryl Streep, Jason Schwartzman, Bill Murray, Wallace Wolodarsky Diretor: Wes Anderson

programme.title: Soldado Universal 3: Regeneração, (2009)
programme.desc: 2009. Um soldado ressuscitado e geneticamente modificado enfrenta seus inimigos, contratados por terroristas nucleares. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Van Damme, Dolph Ludgren Diretor: John Hyams

programme.title: Código de Honra, (2016)
programme.desc: 2016. Um ex-coronel das forças especiais se torna um vigilante que mata criminosos, enquanto um ex-colega quer detê-lo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Steven Seagal, James Russo, Louis Mandylor, Craig Sheffer, Griff Furst, Helena Mattsson, Rafael Petardi, R.D. Call, Michael Flynn, Ileana Huxley Diretor: Michael Winnick

programme.title: Blitz, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Blitz é um serial killer de Londres que está matando policiais. O inspetor-chefe Roberts e o sargento Brant, um detetive de polícia duro, inflexível e politicamente incorreto, terão a tarefa de tentar deter o psicopata. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jason Statham, Paddy Considine, Aidan Gillen, David Riley Diretor: Elliott Lester, Jordan Hill

programme.title: Irmandade, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Kane e sua equipe decidiram acabar com a Yakuza de uma vez por todas. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Steven Seagal, Sarah Lind Diretor: Keoni Waxman

programme.title: Alvo Duplo, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Dois caras durões e pertencentes a lados opostos da lei vão unir forças para dar um ponto final em uma onda de assassinatos brutais, mas a tarefa não será nada fácil e muito sangue vai rolar. Gêneros: Crime Elenco: Christian, Slater, Stallone, Sylvester Diretor: Walter Hill

programme.title: O Franco-Atirador, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. Depois de uma longa carreira como matador de aluguel, Martin Terrier pretende se aposentar e passar o resto da vida ao lado de sua amada. Mas ele descobre que está sendo traído por pessoas de sua confiança! Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Sean Penn, Jasmine Trinca, Javier Bardem Diretor: Pierre Morel

programme.title: Ameaça Explosiva, (2016)
programme.desc: 2016. Depois de uma ameaça de bomba, dois especialistas do FBI mergulham em um jogo mortal de gato e rato com um criminoso, correndo desesperadamente contra o tempo para descobrir o verdadeiro objetivo do homem-bomba, enquanto lutam para salvar sua cidade. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Adam Joseph Copeland, C.j. Perry, Erica Carroll, Julia Benson, Michael Rogers, Mitchell Kummen, Patrick Sabongui Diretor: Stephen Reynolds

programme.title: Carga Explosiva 3, (2008)
programme.desc: 2008. Frank Martin é obrigado a conduzir Valentina, a filha de Leonid Vasilev, o chefe da Agência de Proteção Ambiental da Ucrânia, de Marselha a Odessa, além de dois sacos de conteúdo suspeito. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jason Statham, Robert Knepper, Natalya Rudakova, François Berléand, Jeroen Krabbé, Alex Kobold, David Atrakchi, Yann Sundberg, Eriq Ebouaney, David Kammenos Diretor: Olivier Megaton

programme.title: A Arma, (2023)
programme.desc: 2023. Dallas é uma máquina de matar. Seus ataques a gangues de motociclistas e laboratórios de metanfetamina irritam o chefe da máfia de Las Vegas, que sequestra sua namorada. Dallas não irá parar até que a justiça seja feita. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tony Schiena, AnnaLynne McCord, Sean Patrick Flanery, Cuba Gooding Jr. Diretor: Tony Schiena

programme.title: Blitz, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Blitz é um serial killer de Londres que está matando policiais. O inspetor-chefe Roberts e o sargento Brant, um detetive de polícia duro, inflexível e politicamente incorreto, terão a tarefa de tentar deter o psicopata. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jason Statham, Paddy Considine, Aidan Gillen, David Riley Diretor: Elliott Lester, Jordan Hill

programme.title: Arrume Um Emprego, (2016)
programme.desc: 2016. Miles Teller, Anna Kendrick e Bryan Cranston estrelam nesta nova e hilária comédia sobre como conseguir um emprego em tempos de economia difícil. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Miles Teller, Bryan Cranston, Anna Kendrick, Alison Brie, Christopher Mintz-Plasse, Marcia Gay Harden, Brandon T. Jackson Diretor: Dylan Kidd

programme.title: Heróis Fora de Órbita, (1999)
programme.desc: 1999. Quase vinte anos depois do seriado de TV cult Galaxy Quest ter sido cancelado, o antigo elenco recebe um pedido de ajuda de um espécie alienígena para salvar o universo. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Tim Allen, Sigourney Weaver, Alan Rickman, Tony Shalhoub, Sam Rockwell, Daryl Mitchell, Enrico Colantoni, Robin Sachs, Patrick Breen, Missi Pyle Diretor: Dean Parisot

programme.title: As Testemunhas de Madea, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Um banqueiro de investimento de Wall Street, que foi incriminado como peça-chave do esquema Ponzi, apoiado por sua empresa, é transferido com sua família para a casa do sul de tia Madea. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Daniel Brule, Danielle Campbell, Dean Balkwill, Denise Richards, Devan Leos, Doris Roberts, Eric Brooks, Eugene Levy, Frank Brennan, John Amos Diretor: Tyler Perry

programme.title: Confusões no Lava-Jato, (2001)
programme.desc: 2001. Após começar a trabalhar em um lava-jato, Sean se vê brigando com o melhor amigo, Dee Loc, que também trabalha lá e duvida que Sean tenha sido contratado como seu supervisor. No entanto, eles logo deixam a briga de lado quando o chefe é sequestrado. Quando uma série de ataques de tubarões provocou o pânico na cidade, ela e um perito em tubarões decidiram investigar os estranhos incidentes. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Dolph Lundgren, Danny Roth, Sara Lane Diretor: Jerry Dugan

programme.title: A Família da Noiva, (2005)

programme.title: Nunca Fui Santa, (2000)
programme.desc: 2000. Confiante e com opinião, Megan, de 17 anos, é muito obstinada para seus pais não-armados, que começam a se preocupar com o fato de ela ser lésbica. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Katherine Heigl, Jason O'Mara, Daniel Sunjata Diretor: Julie Anne Robinson

programme.title: O Empregado do Mês, (2022)

programme.title: O Prazer de sua Companhia, (2006)
programme.desc: 2006. Um cara pede sua namorada em casamento e ela simplesmente cai morta. Seu melhor amigo insiste em arrumar encontros para ele. Certo dia, para tirar o amigo do seu pé, ele pede uma garçonete em casamento - ela aceita e uma grande confusão começa. programme.title: Um Amor à Altura, (2022)

Será que ela estará pronta para lidar com o próprio preconceito? Gêneros: Romance Elenco: Jean Dujardin, Virginie Efira, Cédric Kahn, Stéphanie Papanian, César Domboy Diretor: Laurent Tirard

programme.title: Sem Prada Nem Nada, (2011)

programme.title: Santo Antonio, (1946)

programme.title: Muita Calma Nessa Hora, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. As amigas Mari, Tita e Aninha viajam para Búzios e, no caminho, conhecem Estrella, uma garota que pede carona para tentar achar seu pai. Juntas, as quatro garotas vivem situações engraçadas e emocionantes. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: North Hollywood, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Acabando a escola, um jovem precisa decidir entre o sonho de tornar-se skatista profissional ou ir para faculdade como seu pai deseja. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.desc: 1970. Rodrigo aparece e Matilda tenta dizer a ele para ir embora para não encontrar Brela. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Depois que Bela escuta Matilda atendendo ao telefone e chamando alguém de namorado, começa a investigar; Matilda desliga a ligação de Rodrigo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.desc: 1970. Felicia começa a se impor diante de Rodrigo e ele fica surpreso com essa nova atitude; Beatriz continua gripada por ter se escondido no banheiro para evitar Estefanía. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Enquanto Houver Esperança, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Angélica é uma adolescente de 16 anos que luta contra uma forma rara de câncer. E, enquanto seus pais batalham para custear seu tratamento e ganhar mais tempo de vida para a garota, ela se apaixona pela primeira vez. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Um Lobo em Pele de Cordeiro, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em uma terra mágica, em um prado calmo onde ovelhas podem viver sem preocupações, problemas começam a aparecer quando uma alcateia se estabeleceu nas proximidades. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Bons de Bico, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Dois perus rivais encontram uma máquina do tempo e fazem uma viagem maluca ao passado, para o século XVII, para tentar retirar o peru do cardápio tradicional do Dia de Ação de Graças. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Delicadeza do Amor, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma bela jovem perde o marido em um terrível acidente. Inconsolável, ela decide mergulhar de cabeça no trabalho, se dedicando de forma integral. No entanto, um beijo sem motivo aparente em um colega muda essa situação. Gêneros: Drama

programme.desc: 1970. Ruslan, um artista sonha em se tornar um cavaleiro, se apaixona por Mila. A felicidade deles não dura muito tempo. Chernomor, o malvado feiticeiro, rouba Mila diante dos olhos de Ruslan para transformar seu poder de amor em seu próprio poder mágico. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Meteoro: O Fim dos Tempos, (2023)

programme.title: Demigod, (2021)
programme.desc: 2021. Um casal viaja para uma cabana isolada e descobrem a história aterrorizante do local.
